message:
feat(tui): add Toast notifications for async operation feedback (bd-34f6)

Integrate ftui NotificationQueue into the TUI App model to provide
transient visual feedback when async operations complete. Toasts
appear in the top-right corner with appropriate icons and styles:
- Success toasts for refresh/execution/export completion
- Error toasts for failures
- Warning toasts for partial execution failures

The notification queue is ticked on the existing 5s Msg::Tick
subscription and rendered as an overlay in view().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
